title: React Server Components and SSR in 2025: A Game-Changing...
body: Next.js (App Router): Runs on Node or Edge, has built-in RSC support. A page file (app/page.jsx) can be an async Server Component by default. Remix: Uses full SSR with loader functions returning data for components.

title: Understanding the Rendering Lifecycle of React Server Components...
body: Rendering Instruction : Next.js instructs React to render that server component. RSC Payload Creation : React renders the server component and any child components that are also server components, converting them into a special JSON format known as the RSC payload.

title: Critical Security Vulnerability in React Server Components (RSC)
body: React Server Components (RSC) have transformed how modern React and Next.js applications are built — enabling server-first data loading, smaller bundles, and faster performance.

title: Getting Started: Installation | Next.js
body: use server. Components. Font. Form Component.App Folder Structure. Good to know: If you forget to create the root layout, Next.js will automatically create this file when running the development server with next dev.
